articles.title: Elaine Chao Addresses Mitch McConnell's Health, Her Decision To Travel Amid His Hospitalization
articles.content: Keep independent journalism alive. Former Transportation Secretary Elaine Chao issued a statement through a spokesperson addressing growing concerns about the health of her husband, Sen. Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.), and her decision to stay in China during his hospitalization. "The secretary was on a long-planned trip in China to support her family's philanthropic endeavors.
